summary: Tested all 10 requested features for soccer app. All bug fixes and new features verified working: FT/Live status bug fixed, player faces display on lineup pitch, event badges (goals/cards/assists), substitutes bench with Entered/Bench sections, formation labels, legend, and player click navigation.
passed_tests: FT/Live status bug: Match 19425691 shows 'FT' WITHOUT 'LIVE' text or green pulsing dot
Player faces on lineup pitch: 23 player face images from Sportmonks CDN displayed on pitch
Event badges: 3 goal badges (white), 3 yellow card badges, 2 red card badges visible
Substitutes bench: ENTERED section shows subs with entry minutes (88', 76', 69', etc)
Substitutes bench: BENCH section shows unused subs
Substitutes: All 18 subs have face images
Formation labels: Home '4-4-1-1' and Away '4-2-3-1' labels visible on pitch
Legend: All 6 items present (Goal, Yellow, Red, Assist, Sub out, Sub in)
Match header score: Shows '1 : 2' with 'FT' status correctly
Player click navigation: Clicking player navigates to /player/{id} (tested /player/329509)
Backend API lineups: All 40 lineups have nested player.image_path data
Backend API formations: Returns '4-4-1-1' and '4-2-3-1' formations
Backend API events: Returns 17+ events with type_ids for goals/cards/subs
seed_data_creation: None - using Sportmonks live API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All FT/Live bug fixes, lineup pitch player faces, event badges, and substitutes features tested and working. Test match: /match/19425691 (Randers FC 1-2 Fredericia, Feb 22 2026). Home formation 4-4-1-1, away 4-2-3-1. 40 lineup entries, 17 events. Backend correctly includes 'lineups.player' for player images. Google AdSense ad slots are MOCKED visual placeholders.
mocked_api_note: Google AdSense ad display components are placeholder divs (MOCKED)
